title: Prometheus-0 Skill Definition
description: Formal contract for Prometheus-0 skill frontmatter in .claude/skills/skill_*.md. Every skill must conform to this schema. The body below the frontmatter is freeform Markdown and not schema-constrained.

name.description: Skill identifier. Used as the Cherry Studio skill name. Must be unique across all skills.

priority.description: Routing priority. Higher values win when multiple skills match the same input. Values should be unique per skill type, but sub-agent lenses may share a priority tier.

description.description: Brief description of the skill's role, behavior, and trigger context. Displayed in Cherry Studio and used for LLM routing.

trigger.description: Comma-separated trigger keywords. Case-insensitive matching. Each keyword should be concise (typically 2-6 characters for Chinese).
